name: cypress-snapshot-reporter
description: Cypress plugin for visual pixelmatch testing with pixel-level diff, OCR, severity classification, and Excel + Mochawesome reporting. Works fully offline.

scripts.check:artifacts: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const required=['plugin.js','commands.js','src/tasks/constants.js','src/tasks/snapshotTasks.js','src/tasks/ocrTasks.js','src/tessdata/eng.traineddata.gz']; const missing=required.filter((p)=>!fs.existsSync(p)); if(missing.length){throw new Error('Missing required publish artifact(s): '+missing.join(', '));} console.log('Publish artifacts verified.');"
scripts.check:syntax: node --check plugin.js && node --check commands.js && node --check src/tasks/snapshotTasks.js && node --check src/tasks/ocrTasks.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check:artifacts && npm run check:syntax && npm run check:pack && npm run audit:prod

author: Arpit Kumar
